title: Regularizing Cross-Cohort Transcriptomics: A Batch-Distortion Penalty Framework for Alzheimer's Research
abstract: Cross-cohort Alzheimer's disease (AD) blood transcriptomic prediction is sensitive to batch effects introduced during dataset harmonization. Standard pipelines treat batch correction and feature selection as independent steps, allowing features that required extreme mathematical rescuing during harmonization to dominate predictive models. We introduce Batch-Distortion Penalized Feature Selection (BDP-FS), a regularization algorithm that extracts the empirical Bayes location (gamma) and scale (delta) parameters from neuroCombat harmonization and penalizes features exhibiting high technical distortion prior to differential expression ranking. In bidirectional evaluation on AddNeuroMed cohorts GSE63060 and GSE63061, BDP-FS yields a statistically resilient AUROC of 0.899 in the GSE63061->GSE63060 direction (+0.021 delta), while its GMM-anchored soft-weighting variant (v2) reduces signal loss by 27% in high-noise directions. Conversely, we demonstrate that micro-cohort holdouts (N=6) produce artifacts indistinguishable from chance (p=0.26), underscoring the necessity of adequately powered validation cohorts.
skill_md:
---
name: open-phasea-ad-benchmark-repro
description: Reproduce the final leakage-safe AD cross-cohort benchmark (v8 GMM-Soft packaging) with BDP-FS v2 soft-weighting, consistent permutation-null reporting, and AMP-AD Agora feature ablations.
allowed-tools: Bash(python *), Bash(pip *), WebFetch
---

# Reproduction (v1.0.0-phaseA-v8)
1. Clone the repository and checkout the manuscript freeze tag.
2. Install dependencies via requirements.txt.
3. Run: python src/ingest/fetch_ampad_open_subset.py
4. Run: python src/train/run_open_phaseA_benchmark.py
5. Run: python src/eval/tau_hyperparameter_sweep.py
6. Run: python src/eval/compute_open_phaseA_bootstrap.py
7. Run: python src/eval/null_stability_check.py

Expected outputs: outputs/metrics/open_phaseA_main_results.csv, outputs/stats/tau_sweep_metrics.csv, outputs/stats/open_phaseA_auroc_ci.csv.
